# Video: 00:00.000 => 00:43.866
Width: 1080
Height: 608

## Segment 1: 00:00.000 => 00:07.367
The video begins with a scenic aerial view of an island, showcasing the collaboration between Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI. This is followed by a brief glimpse of a person speaking in an office setting, and then transitions to a visual representation of audio waveforms, indicating a discussion about neural TTS and the importance of good data for generating natural voices.

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.
```

Key Frames
- 00:00.726 ![](keyFrame.726.jpg)
- 00:02.046 ![](keyFrame.2046.jpg)
- 00:02.640 ![](keyFrame.2640.jpg)
- 00:04.059 ![](keyFrame.4059.jpg)
- 00:04.884 ![](keyFrame.4884.jpg)
- 00:05.709 ![](keyFrame.5709.jpg)
- 00:06.534 ![](keyFrame.6534.jpg)

## Segment 2: 00:07.367 => 00:13.567
The segment continues with a person speaking, followed by a wide shot of a vast landscape with fields and a data center, emphasizing the scale of data accumulation. The scene then shifts to the interior of a data center, highlighting the infrastructure supporting the TTS model.

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.760
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames

## Segment 3: 00:13.567 => 00:23.967
A person continues to speak about the TTS model, and the video transitions to stunning aerial views of a biplane flying over a coastal region and a castle, illustrating the capabilities of the Flight Simulator enhanced by Azure AI's TTS technology.

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:13.440 --> 00:23.760
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

## Segment 4: 00:23.967 => 00:33.200
The video features another person speaking in an office environment, followed by a close-up of an airplane on a runway, indicating the practical applications of the TTS technology in aviation scenarios.

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.
```

## Segment 5: 00:33.200 => 00:43.866
The final segment shows ground crew guiding an airplane on the tarmac, followed by a close-up of an Airbus aircraft at an airport. The video concludes with the Microsoft logo, signifying the company's involvement in the project.

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 95555, requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.520 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>95555, request to end pushback received.
```

Description.valueString: The video begins with a scenic aerial view of an island, showcasing the collaboration between Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI. This is followed by a brief glimpse of a person speaking in an office setting, and then transitions to a visual representation of audio waveforms, indicating a discussion about neural TTS and the importance of good data for generating natural voices.

The segment continues with a person speaking, followed by a wide shot of a vast landscape with fields and a data center, emphasizing the scale of data accumulation. The scene then shifts to the interior of a data center, highlighting the infrastructure supporting the TTS model.

A person continues to speak about the TTS model, and the video transitions to stunning aerial views of a biplane flying over a coastal region and a castle, illustrating the capabilities of the Flight Simulator enhanced by Azure AI's TTS technology.

The video features another person speaking in an office environment, followed by a close-up of an airplane on a runway, indicating the practical applications of the TTS technology in aviation scenarios.

The final segment shows ground crew guiding an airplane on the tarmac, followed by a close-up of an Airbus aircraft at an airport. The video concludes with the Microsoft logo, signifying the company's involvement in the project.

The segment continues with a person speaking, followed by a wide shot of a vast landscape with fields and a data center, emphasizing the scale of data accumulation. The scene then shifts to the interior of a data center, highlighting the infrastructure supporting the TTS model.

A person continues to speak about the TTS model, and the video transitions to stunning aerial views of a biplane flying over a coastal region and a castle, illustrating the capabilities of the Flight Simulator enhanced by Azure AI's TTS technology.

The video features another person speaking in an office environment, followed by a close-up of an airplane on a runway, indicating the practical applications of the TTS technology in aviation scenarios.
